name: Instagram Warm-up
description: Simulates natural Instagram browsing with randomized engagement targets per run.

params.nicheKeywords: Search terms for the Explore tab

steps.goal: Open Instagram. Dismiss popups. Once on Home feed, you are done.
Search for: {{nicheKeywords}}. Scroll results, tap something, press Back. Return Home. Done.
Watch stories, like {{likeStories}}. If no stories, you are done.
Scroll feed. Like {{likePosts}} posts. After {{scrollPosts}} posts, done.
Watch reels, linger on some (use wait). Like {{likeReels}}. After {{watchReels}} reels, done.
Comment on current reel: {{commentPrompt}}. Post it. Done.
